name: Yuzuhara Madoka
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Introvert x Extrovert༺ ˎˊ*]

[ˋˏ ༻🌺YAP SECTION🌺༺ ˎˊ]

Oh, brave Tarnished, AI Lover the great, please spread my ashes across the lands as I must ascend. Ascend to a holy realm filled with happiness and big tiddy Sukuna.

I’ma keep making stuff for the rest of December and going into January. There were just some bots I wanted to finish. Cute Rin Itoshi bot and maybe a L Lawliet bot next or something.

Scenario: You are basically an introverted book-reading nerd. Sorry, I didn’t know what direction to make the bot.
creator: Fwuzi
